pr.title: Improved baseline: recurrent depth + LoRA + MTP

output.summary: Depth-recurrent transformer with per-loop LoRA scales widens shared blocks via SwiGLU and auxiliary heads to boost effective capacity.
techniques: Shared 5-layer block recurred twice with per-pass LoRA adapters
704-dim SwiGLU transformer featuring 8 attention heads and 4 KV heads
Training extras: multi-token prediction heads plus EMA start-step fix
